tiers.name: Routine Recurring
tiers.ao_action_description: No AO notification required. Log the change and update artifact freshness tracker.
tiers.description: Standard operational activities and vulnerability mitigation within approved baseline.

tiers.name: Adaptive
tiers.ao_action_description: AO must be notified. Generate SIA and Significant Change Notification.
tiers.description: Adjustments to existing components or functionality of the system.

tiers.name: Transformative
tiers.ao_action_description: AO must approve before deployment. Generate SIA, SCN, and flag for AO review.
tiers.description: Adding, replacing, or removing major components and functionality.

tiers.name: Impact Categorization
tiers.ao_action_description: Full re-assessment required. Escalate to ISSM immediately. Block renewal readiness until resolved.
tiers.description: Changes likely to increase or decrease the system's impact level rating.
examples: New PII types changing privacy posture
